title: Your Evangelion mistakes
wikitext:
[]: Your Evangelion mistakes?             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed May 20, 2009 7:02 am What things have you been mistaken about in Evangelion? For me it would be: 1 - Mass Production Evangelions where the strongest characters in the series 2 - Shinji was awesome in the first few eps 3 - Kaworu was a girl 4 - Unit 01 can move at hyper sonic speed

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Wed May 20, 2009 7:13 am 1. The ending wouldn't be confusing as fuck. 2. Thinking that fem-kaworu was a boy 3. Thinking my computer was frozen during Kaworu's death scene. 4. Thinking the MP evas were little pussy minions that can be easily taken out.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Wed May 20, 2009 8:03 am You guys are funny. I was confuffled about the seeds of life/wisdom thing until my second viewing. I also had no idea what was up with Adam (didn't realize the connection to Kaworu and Gendo's hand). Evangelion is very unforgiving if you don't fully absorb every single detail. Although watching it after a religious smoke ritual, I was able to comprehend. @_@

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Wed May 20, 2009 9:20 am Zaiku wrote: 3. Thinking my computer was frozen during Kaworu's death scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Wed May 20, 2009 10:14 am My biggest Eva misconception was that Unit 00 was actually "Naoko-sama."

[]:             Quote Post by GAP » Wed May 20, 2009 11:05 am That Rei had a 'personality' and that Yui was 'spotless.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Wed May 20, 2009 12:59 pm Everything, all the time.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed May 20, 2009 1:00 pm Joining this forum.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed May 20, 2009 1:11 pm What Brik-kun said. ;) But with making mistakes about Evangelion, I simply didn't know enough of what the hell was going on to really make mistakes. The one thing that does come to mind however is me intentionally thinking the Bookend Reis were also Rei 3 in Terminal Dogma (the shot in episode 24' when Rei is neutralizing Kaworu's AT Field) for God knows whatever reason. I don't recall believing that Lilith and Adam were from the same being, mainly because my first viewing of EoE (as well as EoTV) was a Renewal fansub instead of Manga Entertainment's release. With the episode 24' revelation of Lilith being Lilith instead of Adam, I was either "lol okay" about it or might have already read about that on Evaotaku's FAQ or some such thing before watching that episode (Before I watched Eva, I was doing some reading on several things, although spoilers or not it didn't matter because I was still really confused after watching it all).

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Wed May 20, 2009 2:24 pm Another Eva mistake I made: painting my Eva 02 model kit using enamel paints instead of acrylic. I could have saved myself soooo much fuss if I was using acrylic!

[]:             Quote Post by pablumatic » Wed May 20, 2009 5:32 pm Until I actually looked on the internet all the subtleties of Evangelion were lost on me. I also had no real clue what was happening in the final two episodes of the show and the second half of EoE until I read examinations of them online.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed May 20, 2009 5:56 pm What mistakes have I made with Eva? A whole fucking lot. oOoOoOo wrote: Although watching it after a religious smoke ritual, I was able to comprehend. @_@

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed May 20, 2009 7:25 pm My biggest Eva misconception was that Unit 01 was actually "Naoko-sama."

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed May 20, 2009 9:16 pm BrikHaus wrote: Joining this forum.

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Fri May 22, 2009 8:56 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: Do tell.

[]:             Quote Post by GAP » Fri May 22, 2009 11:56 pm BrikHaus wrote: Joining this forum.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat May 23, 2009 1:55 am Defectron wrote: My biggest Eva misconception was that Unit 01 was actually "Naoko-sama."

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat May 23, 2009 3:07 am I'm confident that my biggest Eva mistakes haven't happened yet, so I don't know what to tell ya.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sat May 23, 2009 8:31 am Oedipusfoot wrote: Everything, all the time.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat May 23, 2009 3:27 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: What mistakes have I made with Eva? A whole fucking lot.
